title: brassica campestris f. auriculata
intro: Brassica campestris f. auriculata, also known as curled cabbage or auriculated kale, is a variant of the wild cabbage plant, a member of the Brassicaceae family. The plant contains various medicinal properties, including flavonoids, carotenoids, and glucosinolates, which have been found to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Consuming Brassica campestris f. auriculata has been associated with several health benefits, including reducing the risk of chronic diseases such as heart disease, cancer, and neurodegenerative disorders, as well as supporting immune function and digestion. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and capsules, which are available in health food stores and online.
